name: kirki-toolkit
description: Dev toolkit for Kirki Customizer Framework
author: Kirki Framework

scripts.build: parcel build customizer/controls.js customizer/preview.js --dist-dir tmp-build --no-source-maps && mkdir -p assets/customizer && mv tmp-build/controls.js assets/customizer/controls.min.js && mv tmp-build/controls.css assets/customizer/controls.min.css && mv tmp-build/preview.js assets/customizer/preview.min.js && mv tmp-build/preview.css assets/customizer/preview.min.css && rm -rf tmp-build
scripts.customizer:watch: mkdir -p assets/customizer && ln -sf controls.js assets/customizer/controls.min.js && ln -sf controls.css assets/customizer/controls.min.css && ln -sf preview.js assets/customizer/preview.min.js && ln -sf preview.css assets/customizer/preview.min.css && parcel watch customizer/controls.js customizer/preview.js --dist-dir assets/customizer
